message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 40
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor "Admin\nSAV Manager\nSAV Technician\nScooter Owner" as Admin
boundary verifyEmail as VE
control VerificationController as VC
actor User as U

Admin -> VE : FillVerifyEmailForm(email,token)
VE --> Admin : FormFilled

activate VE
VE -> VE : VerifyVerifyEmailForm(email,token)
VE --> VE : FormVerified
deactivate VE

alt [FormVerified is true]
  VE -> VC : verifyUser(email,code)
  activate VC
  VC -> U : verifyUser(email,code)
  U --> VC : user enabled
  VC --> VE : user enabled
  deactivate VC
  VE --> Admin : user enabled
else [FormVerified is false]
  VE --> Admin : showErrorMessage
end
@enduml
